back_translation: Now, Peter and John were going up to the temple area/courtyard at the hour of prayer, that is, three o'clock in the afternoon.

There was a certain man, lame from his mother's womb. People would carry him and place him every day at the temple gate called 'Beautiful Gate,' so that he could beg alms from those entering into the temple area.
When he saw Peter and John about to enter the temple area, he asked to receive alms from the two of them.
Peter stared at him, together with John, and said, 'Look at us two!'
The man gazed attentively at the two of them, expecting to receive something from them.
But Peter said, 'Silver and gold we do not have. What we have, we give you. In the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth, walk!'
Then Peter took the man's right hand and helped/supported him to rise up. At that moment, his feet (soles) and ankles became strong.
The man leaped up and stood and began to walk, then went with the two of them into the temple area, walking and leaping and praising God (simultaneously).
All the people saw him walking and praising God.
They recognized him, that this was the one who used to sit begging alms at the Beautiful Gate of the temple, and they were filled with wonder and amazement at the event that had happened to him.
While the man was still clinging tightly to Peter and John, all the people, utterly astonished, ran together to the two of them at the portico called 'Solomon's Portico.'

When Peter saw this, he answered to the people, 'Brothers/fellow Israelites, why are you amazed at this matter, and why are you staring at us, as if we had made this man walk by our own power or godly-devotion?'
The God of Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, the God of our ancestors, has glorified Jesus, his Servant, whom you handed over and denied before Pilate, although Pilate had decided to release him.
But you denied/rejected the Holy and Righteous One, and asked that a murderer be released to you.
You killed the One who is the Source/Originator of Life, whom God raised back to life from death. We all are witnesses of this.

The name of Jesus has made this man, whom you see and know, strong, by means of faith in his name. And the faith that comes through Jesus himself has given this man this complete healing in the presence of all of you.
And now, brothers/siblings, I know that you acted out of ignorance, just as did your leaders/rulers.
But what God had foretold/announced-beforehand through the mouth of all the prophets — that his Christ must suffer — God has fulfilled in this way.
Therefore, repent and turn back, so that your transgressions/sins will be blotted out/erased.
So that times of refreshing/reviving of the heart may come from the presence of the Lord, and so that he may send Jesus Christ, the one whom he has appointed for you.
Jesus, heaven must receive (him) until the time when all things will be renewed/restored, just as God has spoken through the mouth of his holy prophets from ancient times.
Moses said, 'The Lord God will raise up for you a prophet from among your brothers/kinsmen, like me. You must listen-and-obey that one in all things that he will say to you.'
Every person who refuses-to-obey that prophet will be cut off from the people of God.'
Moreover, all the prophets, from Samuel and those who followed after, every one who has spoken, also proclaimed these times.

You are descendants of the prophets and heirs of the covenant which God made with your ancestors, when he said to Abraham, 'Through your seed/offspring, all the families in the earth will receive blessing.'
When God raised up his Servant, he sent Jesus to you first, to bless you, by causing each one to turn back from his wicked deeds.'
